grants.title: HFSP Research Grant — Program Grant
grants.description: High-risk, high-reward basic life science research through international teams. India-based PIs can lead or join. One of the most prestigious international grants for life sciences.

grants.title: ICGEB CRP Research Grant 2026
grants.description: ICGEB Collaborative Research Programme (CRP). Supports original research in basic science, human healthcare, industrial/agricultural biotechnology and bioenergy. India is a member state — up to 3 CRP + 2 Early Career Return grants per call. International collaboration mandatory.
eligibility: Researcher at ICGEB Member State institution

grants.title: ICGEB Early Career Return Grant (CRP)
grants.description: Part of ICGEB CRP call. For young PIs returning to ICGEB Member States after postdoctoral training abroad. Supports setting up independent labs. Up to 2 awards per member country per call.

grants.title: ANRF Advanced Research Grant (ARG) — Pre-Proposals 2026
grants.description: ARG subsumes the Core Research Grant (CRG). Supports frontier research in Science & Engineering. Pre-proposal Apr 1–May 8 2026; Full proposals Sep 15–Oct 15 2026. No upper budget limit.

grants.title: ANRF MATRICS 2026 (Mathematics Research Grant)
grants.description: Mathematical Research Impact Centric Support. For active researchers in mathematics. Apr 1 – May 8 2026.

grants.title: ANRF Inclusivity Research Grant (IRG) 2026 — New Scheme
grants.description: New ANRF scheme 2026. Promotes research inclusion. Oct 1–Nov 3 2026.

grants.title: ANRF Prime Minister Early Career Research Grant (PM-ECRG) 2026
grants.description: One-time career grant for early-career faculty. Subsumes erstwhile SRG. ₹60L + overheads for 3 years. Max 700 grants/year.

grants.title: ANRF Core Research Grant (CRG)
grants.description: Supports research proposals in basic and applied sciences from faculty at Indian academic institutions.

grants.title: Grand Challenges Explorations — Open Call
grants.description: Supports bold ideas in global health and development. India-based researchers strongly encouraged.

grants.title: PAR Foundation 2026 Grant — Beyond Antibiotics
grants.description: 2026 theme: 'Beyond Antibiotics: Preventive Strategies That Lower the Need for Antibiotic Use.' Supports research reducing infection risk and improving antimicrobial stewardship. Global applicants welcome including India.

grants.title: Google India Research Award
grants.description: Supports faculty at Indian universities engaged in world-class research relevant to Google. Sub-track for early-career faculty (within 5 years). Annual call.

grants.title: DST-FIST (Fund for Improvement of S&T Infrastructure)
grants.description: Infrastructure grant for upgrading S&T facilities at universities and colleges. Level I (up to ₹80L) and Level II (up to ₹2Cr).

grants.title: DST-PURSE (Promotion of University Research and Scientific Excellence)
grants.description: Grants to universities with good research output to strengthen research infrastructure and programs.

grants.title: DST Science and Heritage Research Initiative (SHRI)
grants.description: Research integrating modern science with India's ancient heritage — astronomy, mathematics, metallurgy, traditional medicine.

grants.title: Schemes/ Programmes
grants.description: Schemes/ Programmes RDI Fund S&T Capacity Building Programmes Institutional Capacity Building Programmes Research & Development Programmes Innovation and Technology Development Programmes Science for Society Programmes National Missions International Cooperation & Mega Science S&T Data, Policy and T

grants.description: S&T Capacity Building Programmes

grants.title: India-France call for proposals in Applied Mathematics and Artificial Intelligence by DST and ANR
grants.description: India-France call for proposals in Applied Mathematics and Artificial Intelligence by DST and ANR

grants.title: India - Netherlands Hydrogen Fellowship Programme
grants.description: India - Netherlands Hydrogen Fellowship Programme

grants.title: Call for proposal of India Science and Research Fellowship (ISRF) 2025-26
grants.description: Call for proposal of India Science and Research Fellowship (ISRF) 2025-26

grants.title: Call for Proposals (CFP) under Scheduled Cast Sub Plan (SCSP)  Mission सह-SANKALP
grants.description: Call for Proposals (CFP) under Scheduled Cast Sub Plan (SCSP)  Mission सह-SANKALP

grants.title: Archive Call For Proposals
grants.description: Archive Call For Proposals

grants.title: UGC Major Research Project (MRP)
grants.description: Major Research Projects in Sciences (up to ₹12L) and Humanities/Social Sciences (up to ₹10L). For permanent faculty at UGC-recognized institutions.

grants.title:
Web portal for
                                            Fellowship/Scholarship Legacy Cases
grants.description:
UGC scheme: Web portal for
                                            Fellowship/Scholarship Legacy Cases

grants.title: MeitY AI Innovation Programme
grants.description: Applied Research Track: ₹2–5Cr for AI projects at academic institutions (70% funded). Focus: healthcare, agriculture, education, smart cities.

grants.title: MeitY Cyber Security Research Grant
grants.description: Research proposals in cybersecurity. Submission by email with subject 'Proposal for Research in Cyber Security'.

grants.title: IMPRINT-2 Research Grant (IIT-led)
grants.description: Impacting Research Innovation and Technology. Funds India-centric problems across 10 technology domains. IIT/NIT-led, but any Indian institution can collaborate.

grants.title: SERB-POWER Research Grant (Women Researchers)
grants.amount: Up to ₹30 Lakhs (Level II — SASTRA eligible) / ₹60L (Level I)
grants.description: Promotes women researchers in science and engineering. Two levels: Level I for IITs/IISc/NITs/Central Univ (up to ₹60L, 3yr); Level II for State/Private institutions like SASTRA (up to ₹30L, 3yr). Regular academic/research position required. All S&E frontier areas.

grants.title: ANRF Start-up Research Grant (SRG)
grants.description: For faculty who obtained PhD ≤5 years ago and are in first faculty position. Supports independent research setup. Rolling applications throughout year. Cannot simultaneously hold NPDF or TARE.

grants.title: ANRF Prime Minister Early Career Research Grant (PM-ECRG)
grants.description: New ANRF scheme replacing SERB-ECRA. Supports early career researchers at Indian institutions. INSPIRE Faculty, Ramanujan, and Ramalingaswami Fellows are explicitly eligible. Budget up to ₹1L/year each for travel and contingency.

grants.title: DST Young Scientist Award (SERC Fast Track / SRG equivalent)
grants.description: ANRF/SERB early career support for young scientists. Fast-track funding mechanism for scientists within 5 years of PhD. Superseded partially by SRG; check ANRF portal for current active scheme name.

grants.title: AICTE Research Promotion Scheme (RPS)
grants.description: Promotes research culture in AICTE-approved institutions. Two tracks: Basic/Applied Research (₹20L, 2yr) and Development Research (₹30L, 3yr). Less competitive than DST/DBT — underutilised by faculty at deemed universities. SASTRA is directly eligible. Submit via AICTE web portal.

grants.title: AICTE Margdarshan — Faculty Development Grant
grants.description: AICTE faculty development and capacity building grants. Covers short-term courses, workshops, and training programmes at premier institutions. Also includes Quality Improvement Programme (QIP) support.

grants.title: AICTE-INAE (Indian National Academy of Engineering) Research Grant
grants.description: Joint AICTE-INAE scheme for frontier engineering research. Includes Young Engineer Award track with research support. For engineering disciplines at AICTE institutions.

grants.title: Novo Nordisk Foundation Challenge Programme — Open Call
grants.amount: Varies by call (up to DKK millions)
grants.description: NNF Challenge Programmes tackle specific global health/life science problems. Some calls explicitly open to international (including Indian) collaborators. Focus areas: infectious disease, antimicrobial resistance, metabolic disease, data science for health. Check current open calls.

grants.title: NNF Data Science Research Infrastructure Grant
grants.description: Supports computational biology, bioinformatics, and data science research infrastructure. Increasingly open to global collaborations. India-based researchers with Danish collaborators are eligible.

grants.title:
J
                                                        C Bose National Fellowship
grants.description:
ANRF open call: J
                                                        C Bose National Fellowship

grants.description: भारतीय कृषि अनुसंधान परिषद indian council of agricultural research Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

grants.title: Filling up the post of Advisor to the Executive Director (India), International Monetary Fund (IMF)
grants.description: Filling up the post of Advisor to the Executive Director (India), International Monetary Fund (IMF)

grants.title: ICAR–IIMR, Hyderabad Signs Tripartite MoU with VSI Pune and IFGE for Research Collaboration and Promotion of Millets for Bioenergy
grants.description: ICAR–IIMR, Hyderabad Signs Tripartite MoU with VSI Pune and IFGE for Research Collaboration and Promotion of Millets for Bioenergy

grants.title: ICAR–SBI, Coimbatore Launches Tribal Training Campaign and DAPSTC Project in Tiruppur District
grants.description: ICAR–SBI, Coimbatore Launches Tribal Training Campaign and DAPSTC Project in Tiruppur District

grants.title: Show — Research Institutes
grants.description: Show — Research Institutes Hide — Research Institutes समतुल्य विश्वविद्यालय संस्थान कृषि प्रौद्योगिकी अनुप्रयोग अनुसंधान संस्थान निदेशालय/परियोजना निदेशालय राष्ट्रीय ब्यूरो राष्ट्रीय अनुसंधान केंद्र

grants.title: Hide — Research Institutes
grants.description: Show — Research Institutes Hide — Research Institutes समतुल्य विश्वविद्यालय संस्थान कृषि प्रौद्योगिकी अनुप्रयोग अनुसंधान संस्थान निदेशालय/परियोजना निदेशालय राष्ट्रीय ब्यूरो राष्ट्रीय अनुसंधान केंद्र

grants.title: DBT BUILDER Programme
grants.description: Infrastructure and research support for universities to build interdisciplinary life science departments.

grants.title: ICMR Ad-hoc Research Projects (Extramural)
grants.description: Main ICMR extramural research funding for biomedical and health research. Open to medical colleges, universities, and research institutions.

grants.title: ICMR ANVESHAN — Small Research Grant
grants.description: New ICMR small grant scheme. Faster turnaround than ad-hoc. Up to ₹30L. Follow-on ANVESHAN also available.

grants.title: ICMR NISCHA — Intermediate Research Grant
grants.description: ICMR intermediate-scale grant for established researchers. Mid-tier between ANVESHAN (small) and full ad-hoc grants. For health research with clear translational potential.

grants.title: ICMR Start-Up Grant for Induction into Biomedical Research
grants.description: Seed grant for newly appointed faculty entering biomedical/health research. Helps establish research programme at a new institution.

grants.title: BIRAC BioNEST (Biotech Incubator Support)
grants.description: Supports establishment of biotech incubators at academic institutions. Covers infrastructure and startup support. Academic institutions can apply.

grants.title: BIRAC SBIRI (Small Business Innovation Research Initiative)
grants.description: Industry-academia collaborative grants for late-stage biotech product development. Phase I (₹50L) and Phase II (₹4Cr). Requires industry partner.

grants.title: BIRAC BIPP (Biotechnology Industry Partnership Programme)
grants.description: Large-scale industry-government partnership for national-need biotech product development.

grants.title: BIRAC PACE (Academia-Industry Translation Research)
grants.description: Bridges laboratory research and commercial product. Indian institution + industry partner required.

grants.title: BIRAC DBT-BIRAC AMR Mission
grants.description: Dedicated AMR research programme. Novel diagnostics, therapeutics, vaccines against drug-resistant pathogens. Directly relevant to ESKAPE pathogen research.

grants.title: DBT-BIRAC Bio-AI Joint Call (BioE3 Biomanufacturing)
grants.description: Joint call for Bio-AI proposals for biomanufacturing hubs under BioE3 Policy. AI + biotechnology convergence. Check birac.nic.in for current deadline.

grants.title: DBT-BUILDER Programme
grants.description: Biotechnology/Life Sciences University-Based Interdisciplinary Life Sciences Department and Research (BUILDER). Infrastructure and research support for universities to build interdisciplinary life sciences programs.

grants.title: ICMR ANVESHAN — Small Research Grant (ICMR SMALL)
grants.description: ICMR's new small grant scheme (rebranded). Investigator-initiated research proposals in biomedical and health sciences. Faster turnaround than ad-hoc grants. Follow-on ANVESHAN available for ongoing work.

grants.title: NIH R01 Research Grant (Indian Institution eligible as Foreign Org)
grants.description: Indian institutions can apply as foreign organisations. Technically eligible but rare in practice — requires SAM/eRA Commons registration and strong US relevance justification. Most practical route: partner with US PI who leads the R01 with Indian team as foreign component.

grants.title: NIH R21 Exploratory Research (Foreign Organisation eligible)
grants.description: Shorter exploratory grant — easier entry point than R01 for foreign orgs. 2 years, up to USD 275,000. Check each FOA eligibility section for foreign org permission before applying.

grants.title: PAR Foundation 2026 Grant — Beyond Antibiotics
grants.description: 2026 theme: 'Beyond Antibiotics: Preventive Strategies That Lower the Need for Antibiotic Use.' Supports AMR prevention research and educational initiatives. Global applicants including India eligible.

grants.title: ANRF JC Bose Grant 2026
grants.description: For senior researchers (Professor-level). ₹25L/year × 5 years.

grants.title: ANRF-ATRI Scheme 2026
grants.description: Call for Proposals Jan 15–Feb 24 2026 (5 PM). See anrf.gov.in.
